productDisplayName: Puma Men's Tergament Black Beige Silver Shoe
description: Fantastically stylish, the puma Tergament trainer belongs to puma's Heritage Collection, making it a must-have in every man's wardrobe. Sleek and stylish, this slip on trainer is a gorgeous shoe for budding Sports enthusiasts.Upper Synthetic leather upper for protection and durability Slip-on design for easy insertion and removal of the foot Padded collar for enhanced comfort Stitch detailing as design element Contrast panelled logo design to the side for an element of style Padded tongue for comfort Fit Midsole EVA lightweight midsole for superior shock absorption Outsole Multi-directional pattern in carbon rubber for superior grip on rough terrain Pivot points to facilitate 180 degree movement of the feet without causing injury
